text: Sprinting to the LZ. Cardio skill: unallocated. Regret: allocated.
Running to extract. The backpack jingles like a vending machine falling down stairs. Every robot heard it.
Saw one more crate near the LZ. Reached for it. The shuttle pilot honked. Honked back. Boarding anyway.
Popped smoke at the LZ for dramatic effect. Now can't see the shuttle. Or anything.
Three Anxieticks in pursuit. They're nervous, we're nervous, the shuttle is nervous. Took shrapnel.
Shuttle arrived early. Pilot said 'get in, loser, we're hoarding.' Immediate dust-off.
Extract beacon jammed by a Tattletale. Shuttle waved off. Extraction unsuccessful. Re-entering the zone with dignity intact-ish.
Another raider was camping the LZ. We emoted. They did not emote back.
Roomba Prime rolled onto the LZ at the worst possible moment. The floor is clean. The raider is not okay.
Aboard the shuttle. Hovering over the big green RETURN HOME button. Savoring the moment. Pressing it.
